title: BreSii Wireless Mouse, Wireless Mouse for Laptop with Mouse Pad, Type-C & USB 2 in 1 Receiver Cordless Computer Mice Slim Silent Mouse for Tablet,PC,Laptop,MacBook,Notebook,Phone(Grey)
features: 【Wireless Mouse for Laptop with Mouse Pad】wireless mouse with 2 in 1 2.4G USB and Type-C receivers, specially slim and grey color designed mouse for MAC book, imac, and all devices with Type-C or USB port, works for MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, iMac, Mac mini. The mouse pad is made of non-toxic, safe and soft breathable materials. The surface adopts premium-textured and smooth cloth to let your mouse glides over smoothly and the non-slip rubber base provides stable operation for the mouse.

【Wireless Mouse Fast Operation 2.4G Wireless Plug and Play】Mouse USB/USB C receiver is in the battery compartment of the mouse. Take it out and plug it into the type-C/USB port of the device. No additional drivers or software needed. Then enjoy 2.4G wireless stable connection and a longer working distance of up to 33-65ft.

【Silent Mouse Quiet Click & Ultra-Slim】For Mac mouse Special soundless Mouse buttons help you build a quiet atmosphere without disturbing others. Ultra-Slim mouse size makes it easy to put into your laptop bag, suitable for home, office, school and café etc. The scroll wheel is wrapped with anti-skid silica gel to reduce the pressure of your fingers. It is an ideal choice to help your kids work well on their E-Learning on laptops.

【Type c Mouse Strong Energy Saving】Automatically power saving and sleep mode make the battery life longer, it will into power saving mode after 5 seconds and sleep mode after 15 minutes, it just click any button to wake up when use. There is also on/off switch to help conserve battery use. Don't need to replace the battery for months. (Battery is not included)

【Wide Compatibility High Accuracy】High Speed DPI up to 1600, tracks well and no delays. Compatible with system: ●Windows XP/ 7 /8 /10 ●Mac OS ●Mac IOS ● Android etc. Compatible with devices: PC, Computer, Laptop, MacBook, Notebook, Chrome book, Phone and Tablet etc. (As long as your device has a Type-c or ordinary USB port.)

reviews.title: Quiet and comfortable

title: Unipows Wireless Mouse - 2.4G Slim Portable Computer Mouse with Nano Receiver, Less Noise Mobile Optical Mice for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer, Mac (Black and Grey)
description:
Enjoy freedom and efficiency when you use the Wireless Mouse. Compact design, easy to take to anywhere. Plug the nano transceiver into your computer's USB port for a reliable wireless connection without any hassle of additional wire and driver. High Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Quiet clicks make you concentrate more on your work, and don’t disturb people around.
Product features:
Wireless connectivity for reliable usage Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking Noiseless click, soft touch  High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces. Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability
Specification:
Dimensions: 1.4 x 2.6 x 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  Battery: 1 x AA battery (not included) Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes
Package include:
1 x Wireless Mouse 1 x USB nano Receiver (stored in back of the mouse)
features: Portable and Noiseless - Stow the USB receiver inside the wireless mouse when not in use. Take it to anywhere like home, office, coffee shop, etc. Responsive buttons provide soft click with less noise.

2.4GHz Stable Wireless Connection - A tiny wireless receiver (stored in back of the mouse) provides stronger anti-interference ability, faster transmission speed and more reliable connection up to 15m (49 feet), without any hassle of additional wire and driver. Just plug and play.

Enduring Quality & Power Saving - High DPI Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Rated to 5 million comfortable clicks. Turn into sleep mode in 8 minutes of inactivity for energy saving, easily activated by clicking any button. 1 AA Battery (NOT Included) is needed for this mouse.
Ergonomic Shape & Smooth Hand Feeling - Slim ergonomic design and smooth surface for an incredible user experience. Space grey perfect for office use, and can match any color device.

Wide Compatibility - Work with Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, Mac OS X 10.4 etc. NOTE: This product is connected by USB receiver, and is NOT compatible with Macbook pro or other laptops which only come with type C port.

reviews.title: Very cute.

Overall I was very pleased with the product. Really looovvvve how cute it looks.

reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Great.

reviews.title: Love it!!!
reviews.text: Love this mouse!! No more cord for my cat to chew. Beautiful graphic and sleek design. SOOO easy to use! Wish I had gotten this a long time ago!!

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text:
The factory feet on my mouse were leaving dark spots on my light colored desk at work.
These fit great and have noticeably lower friction than the worn factory pads. The adhesive is strong but repositionable if you don't get it right first time.
When the old pads are removed, they can split into separate layers, but you should be able to get down to the bare plastic if you take care to grab the lowest layer of clear adhesive.

title: Logitech M305 Gold Tendrils Wireless Mouse
description: This wireless mouse features 1000 dpi optical technology for responsive cursor control and 2.4GHz wireless technology for a reliable connection.

reviews.title: Nice design
reviews.text: I use this with my netbook to control it across the room. It is smaller than most other mouse. It goes easily in my travel bag. Nice design. I got tired of plain black.

reviews.title: One of the best everyday mice I've used
reviews.text:
I have input devices for drawing on my tablet, and I have a gaming mouse, but the Logitech M305 is an excellent mouse for every day use, so it's the one I use the most.

The mouse itself has very basic features,
* scroll wheel (mild clicking feedback)with side-click options
* battery status light (green when fully charged, red when almost out)
* two buttons
* an off switch
* a nano USB transmitter than stores inside the mouse
* uses a single AA battery

It does come in jazzy designs, and I liked the yellow/gold one the best. The one thing I might have wanted to change on this mouse is the on/off switch. The best nano-USB mouse I've ever had would automatically turn off when you stored the transmitter inside. With this one, be sure to flip the switch to off as well before you put it in your bag, or it will be down there draining the battery as it moves around.

title: COO Wireless Mouse, LED Slim Dual Mode(Bluetooth 5.1 and 2.4G Wireless) Rechargeable Led Wireless Mouse with 3 Adjustable DPI for iPad OS 13, MacBook, Laptop, Mac OS 10.10
features: 【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by simply toggle switching.It can connecting one device through Bluetooth and the other through 2.4GHz USB Receiver. Note: You can't use Bluetooth mode and 2.4G mode at the same time.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries.To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【WIDE COMPATIBILITY】2.4GHz mode works with laptop, desktop or any device with USB port, simply plug the USB receiver and play directly. Bluetooth mode works with Windows/ Android/ MAC OS system. 【NOTE: BT5.1System Requirement: Windows 8.0, Windows 10 or later; MacOSX 10.10 or later; iPad OS 13 or later/ Android 5.0 or later. Please check or update the operating system before using

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【PORTABLE & POCKET SIZE】Lightweight, slim design make it perfectly for travel, easy to put in your laptop bag or pockets.

title: Packard Bell 24 Inch Monitor FHD 1920 x 1080 Computer Monitor, 75 Hertz, 5 MS, Dual Monitor, Wireless Keyboard and Wireless Mouse, VESA, VGA and HDMI Monitor, Basic Monitor and Gaming Monitor – 2 Pack
features: High-Quality Visuals - The Packard Bell airFrame 24 is equipped with a 1920 x 1080p resolution, this monitor delivers crisp and clear visuals that are great for both gaming and office use.

Fast Refresh Rate and Response Time - With a 75 hertz refresh rate and a 5 ms response time, the Packard Bell 24 Inch Monitor provides a smooth and seamless experience, making it perfect for gamers and anyone who needs a fast and responsive display.
VESA Mount Compatible – The airFrame 24 is compatible with VESA mounts, which allows you to easily mount it on a wall or a monitor arm for a more ergonomic setup.
Adjustable Stand - The stand is adjustable, with a 5 degree forward tilt and a 15 degree backward tilt, making it easy to find the most comfortable viewing angle.

Wide Viewing Angle - The airFrame 24 has a 178 degree viewing angle, which ensures that the display looks great from almost any angle, making it perfect for students who need to share their screen with others. Plus, it's compatible with PC, Xbox, and PS5, making it a versatile option for any setup.

reviews.title: Great price for this two pack
reviews.text: I was really impressed with how well these monitors were packed for shipment. They arrived quickly and were better quality than expected.

reviews.title: Value of the product
reviews.text: It was nice to get two 24" monitors for the price of one. It greatly helps by increasing the amount of screen I have to work with and the picture quality is phenomenal.

reviews.title: great monitor for the price
reviews.text: A great value and more importantly an excellent monitor.  I like the narrow edge border as it provides more space than my previous monitor without sacrificing screen space.  I like the clarity, no dead pixels, and less blue light issues.  very satisfied.

reviews.title: Easy to view and use.
reviews.text: I'm enjoying my first extended screen and found it quite intuitive. The colors are bright and the 24" size is great for a smaller setup. The screen can tip up and down but it does not rotate. No problem for me.

title: Corsair Ironclaw Wireless RGB, Rechargeable Wireless Optical Gaming Mouse with Slipstream Technology (18,000 DPI Optical Sensor, 3-Zone RGB Multi-Colour Backlighting), Black
description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage
Ultra-durable Omron Switches: Rated for more than 50 million clicks

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

title: LED Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop iPad MacBook pro Wireless Mouse for Laptop MacBook Air Mac Chromebook
description: Packing list: Instructions x1, LED charging Bluetooth + 2.4G dual-mode wireless mouse x1, 2.4g Nano USB wireless receiver x1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line x1, USB C-type adapter x1, packing box x1, How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:  Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse. How to connect to iPad Pro/iPad Air/ Mini/ iPhone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse  first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.) (1) open ipad Settings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)  🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse? 🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it

💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
✅BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.please please keep the mouse power switch in "ON" position when charging .

✅ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

✅AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up.

reviews.title: Lightweight and smooth.

I will say that you do have to push a bit harder to click the mouse than I am normally used to, but it's negligible and ultimately didn't bother me. reviews.text: Only purchased because it stated it was "like" Microsoft. But I should have read closer, It stated it was compatible with Microsoft. Still, the software is easy to use and installs without problem. Great starter for maybe the high school student wanting to learn basics. reviews.title: Super product. Great price.
reviews.text: Really responsive and not overly sensitive. Has been a great addition for tablet. Seamless connection didn’t loose once. Easy to navigate instructions for set up. Great battery life. Used for 7 hours consecutive without sign of needing charged.

reviews.title: Move along. Don't waste your time and money here.
reviews.text:
UPDATE: Two months! Two months this mouse lasted, and that was with very light use. Fully charged, I was just scrolling with it when I felt the wheel break. It just stopped making the little clicky sound/feeling. No trauma, no misuse, just very very very cheaply made. I surrender. It's time to cough up the money and buy the Apple brand mouse for my MacBook. My sanity is at least worth the $60.

ORIGINAL REVIEW:
After three previous tries, I finally got a Bluetooth mouse for my MacBook. I'm hoping this one is sturdier than the last I purchased that barely lasted six months. That remains to be seen, but given the product materials, I'm not hopeful. Making the connection after power-up or sleep mode is a little finicky. Also, a solid flat dark surface/mouse pad seems to be a prerequisite. Without it, the cursor is slow to respond or just does its own thing. I've never seen a mouse with the jitters before, but this one will cause the cursor to jiggle and twitch, even though the mouse itself it perfectly still, untouched. I've watched the cursor jitter clear off the screen. However, using a solid black mouse pad seems to have dealt with the problem. I would send it back and try a different product, but I've sent so many cheaply made and/or mislabeled mice back to Amazon in the past month, I've got return fatigue. We'll give this one a chance with the mousepad solution.

reviews.title: Won't hold a charge - must keep plugged in
reviews.text:
I've been through two of these. I returned/exchanged this first hoping it was just a defect. This mouse will only function appropriately for about 4-5 minutes tops if not directly plugged in to USB , otherwise it starts jumping/skipping/lagging etc. Plugged in it's perfect though - so if you get lucky and get one that holds a charge you'll probably be very happy with it. I just decided to keep this one and keep it plugged in. It's not ideal but it gets the job done.
I should probably mention that it is very easy to set up, basically plug and play - which was nice.

reviews.title: Worth it!
reviews.text: This purchase is worth it. The mouse is slim and connects perfectly with the laptop. Careful you don't lose the mouse in your papers!

title: Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
description:
Product Description
World’s Most Advanced Tracking — Go More Places Than Optical or Laser. The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets — even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
From the Manufacturer
Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
Comfortable shape
World's Most Advanced Tracking - Go More Places Than Optical or Laser
The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets - even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
BlueTrack Technology
Comfort for Either Hand
Work anywhere with the world's most advanced tracking.
Comfort and durability
Modern design and premium finish provides comfort for either hand. Symmetrical shape and unique rubber grips give you control and cushioning.
Snap in and Go
Simply snap in the transceiver for convenient on-the-go storage.
Reliable Wireless
Microsoft 2.4 ghz wireless delivers a reliable connection with up to a 30-foot range.
8-Month Battery Life
Use your mouse without power interruption for up to 8 months. The snap-in transceiver automatically turns the mouse on and off, and the led battery status indicator lets you know when replacement is needed.
What is BlueTrack?
BlueTrack Technology works on more surfaces than both optical and laser mice. It uses high-angle imaging optics to generate an accurate picture of the surface.
System Requirements
Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP (excluding Windows XP 64-bit)
Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP (excluding Windows XP 64-bit)

2 AA alkaline included

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse one mouse can switch freely between two devices. Note: If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries. To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【MULTI-FUNCTION BUTTON】Forward and backward button to provide convenience for browsing pages and games.

reviews.title: Liked it but doesn’t last long
reviews.text: The reviews seemed to be a mix so I figured I’d give the mouse a shot with my MacBook. Worked great until one week after the return window closed and now it’s worthless junk. I would skip this.

reviews.title: Wheel Started Squeaking Less than 2 Weeks into Usage
reviews.text: I love the design of this mouse but the scrolling wheel started squeaking when used less than 14 days into using this mouse and it's, quite honestly, a bit maddening.  I can't figure out WHY it's squeaking and I've tried using compressed air to maybe clean something that might have gotten into the mouse to no avail.  It still squeaks.  All. The. Time.

reviews.title: Works perfectly with my iPad
reviews.text:
I bought this so I could mirror my iPad to my 27" iMac and play some gorgeous games on a big screen. The mouse lets me use the iPad as an, um, mousepad...works beautifully. The instructions were easy to follow and the box contains a wireless receiver if you don't want to use bluetooth. Also in the box is a USB adapter if you need to plug the receiver into a USB-C port.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

reviews.title: Great mouse

title: CC Store LED Wireless Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse &2.4GHz Instant Connection,Rechargeable Ultra Silent Slim,3 DPI 2 Connection Modes with USB-C to USB Adapter for Laptop/MacBook/PC/Tablet/iPad (Black-red)
features: 【DUAL MODE】BT5.1+2.4GHz:The bottom of the mouse has a switch,you can control the free switching between the two devices.Advanced optical tracking technology with fast click and responsiveness. 3-Level adjustable DPI (1000/1200/1600 DPI), freely to satisfy daily work. 【Rechargeable Mouse】Built-in durable 500mAh rechargeable battery, no need to replace the battery. It can be easily charged with the included micro USB cable, charging for 2~3 hours, continuous use for about 1 week, and standby time for more than 30 days. It will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation to save power and provides long term usage. You can wake it up by clicking any button.

This silent mouse has been tested over 5 million keystroke life, ensuring responsive clicks and longer lifespan for daily use.

title: TECKNET Mini Wireless Mouse, 2.4GHz Small Computer Mouse with USB Receiver, 3 Adjustable DPI Portable Mouse for Kids, AA Battery Powered Travel Mouse for Laptop, PC, Mac, Chromebook-Grey
features: 【Plug and Play】No need to install any driver. Just plug the 2.4GHz USB receiver into the device to ensure powerful and reliable connection. TECKNET purple wireless mouse works perfect on a variety of surfaces, such as desktops, cloth, paper, etc. Working distance up to 33ft/10m.

【Portable & Noiseless】With the size of 2.44 x 1.42 x 4.02inches, weights only 1.87ounces, the silent mouse is easy to store in your bag. Quiet click frees you from worring about bothering others, keep you stay focused while working and studying.

【Ultra-Long Battery Life】Adopted the advanced process chips and intelligent power-saving technology, the mini wireless mouse only needs 1 AA battery (not included) to support 18 months use. Featuring auto sleep, quick wake up and long time standby this cordless mouse automatically enters sleep mode during inactivity to save power. Simply click or move the wireless travel mouse to return back to work.

【Meet Your Daily Use】TECKNET small kids mouse has adjustable DPI (1600/1200/800), provides you with 2X faster response, and perfectly adapts to a 4K/8K high-definition display, you can set different DPI according to your needs. The portable mouse is ergonomically symmetrical, satisfies both left and right handed use.

【Universal Compatibility】This laptop mouse works perfectly withWindows11/10/8/7/2003/2000/XP, Mac OS X 10.4, etc. Please note: This mouse connects via a USB receiver and is not compatible with Macbook Pro or other devices that only have a Type C port.
